security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: http://asset.localhost; media-src 'self' blob: asset: http://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https: wss: http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:*; font-src 'self' data:

bundle.longDescription: Parla is a voice dictation app for Windows with local Whisper models, NVIDIA Parakeet via ONNX Runtime, cloud providers (Groq, Deepgram, ElevenLabs, Mistral, Soniox, Speechmatics, Gemini) and LLM-powered enhancement (local llama.cpp, Ollama, Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, Mistral, Groq, Cerebras, OpenRouter, Custom).
